languages.text: Пленником ксеносов оказался и Ангел Императора. Он не в силах отвратить свою судьбу, но жаждет продолжить служение. Ныне его жизнь находится в руках Лорда-капитана.

traits.locale_text: Пленником ксеносов оказался и Ангел Императора. Он не в силах отвратить свою судьбу, но жаждет продолжить служение. Ныне его жизнь находится в руках Лорда-капитана.

languages.text: The Angel of the Emperor has also been taken prisoner by the xenos. Powerless to avert his fate, he nonetheless yearns to continue his service. Now, his life rests in the Lord Captain's hands.
languages.original_text: Пленником ксеносов оказался и Ангел Императора. Он не в силах отвратить свою судьбу, но жаждет продолжить служение. Ныне его жизнь находится в руках Лорда-капитана.

traits.locale_text: The Angel of the Emperor has also fallen prisoner to the xenos. Powerless to avert his fate, he nonetheless yearns to continue his service. Now, his life rests in the Lord Captain's hands.
The Angel of the Emperor has also fallen prisoner to the xenos. Powerless to avert his fate, he nonetheless yearns to continue his service. Now, his life rests in the Lord Captain's hands.
The Angel of the Emperor has also been taken prisoner by the xenos. Powerless to avert his fate, he nonetheless yearns to continue his service. Now, his life rests in the Lord Captain's hands.
The Angel of the Emperor has also been taken prisoner by the xenos. Powerless to avert his fate, he nonetheless yearns to continue his service. Now, his life rests in the Lord Captain's hands.

languages.text: Der Engel des Imperators wurde ebenfalls von den Xenos gefangen genommen. Er kann seiner Bestimmung nicht entgehen, sehnt sich aber nach der Fortsetzung seines Dienstes. Nun ruht sein Leben in den Händen des Lord Captains.
languages.original_text: The Angel of the Emperor has also been taken prisoner by the xenos. Powerless to avert his fate, he nonetheless yearns to continue his service. Now, his life rests in the Lord Captain's hands.

traits.locale_text: Der Engel des Imperators wurde ebenfalls von den Xenos gefangen genommen. Er kann seiner Bestimmung nicht entgehen, sehnt sich aber nach der Fortsetzung seines Dienstes. Nun ruht sein Leben in den Händen des Lord Captains.

languages.text: L'ange de l'Empereur a également été fait prisonnier par les xénos. S'il n'a pas pu échapper à son sort funeste, il souhaite encore ardemment reprendre son service. Désormais, sa vie est entre les mains {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine}.
languages.original_text: The Angel of the Emperor has also been taken prisoner by the xenos. Powerless to avert his fate, he nonetheless yearns to continue his service. Now, his life rests in the Lord Captain's hands.

traits.locale_text: L'ange de l'Empereur a également été fait prisonnier par les xénos. S'il n'a pas pu échapper à son sort funeste, il souhaite encore ardemment reprendre son service. Désormais, sa vie est entre les mains {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine}.

languages.text: 帝皇的天使也被那异形囚禁了。虽然无力改变自己的命运，但他仍渴望继续履行职责。现在，他的生命就掌握在舰长大人手中。
languages.original_text: The Angel of the Emperor has also been taken prisoner by the xenos. Powerless to avert his fate, he nonetheless yearns to continue his service. Now, his life rests in the Lord Captain's hands.

traits.locale_text: 帝皇的天使也被那异形囚禁了。虽然无力改变自己的命运，但他仍渴望继续履行职责。现在，他的生命就掌握在舰长大人手中。

languages.text: El ángel del Emperador es otro cautivo de los xenos. No puede evitar su destino, pero anhela reanudar su servicio. Su destino está ahora en manos de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán.
languages.original_text: The Angel of the Emperor has also been taken prisoner by the xenos. Powerless to avert his fate, he nonetheless yearns to continue his service. Now, his life rests in the Lord Captain's hands.

traits.locale_text: El ángel del Emperador es otro cautivo de los xenos. No puede evitar su destino, pero anhela reanudar su servicio. Su destino está ahora en manos de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán.

languages.text: 皇帝の天使もまたゼノスの捕虜である。彼は破滅を回避する力はないが、奉仕を続けたいと切望している。今、彼の命は大尉の手の中にある。
languages.original_text: The Emperor's Angel is also a prisoner of the Xenos. He is powerless to avert the doom, but longs to continue his service. Now his life is in the hands of the Lord Captain.

languages.text: İmparator'un Meleği de zenolar tarafından esir alınmış. Kaderini önlemekten âciz olsa da yine de hizmetine devam etmeye can atıyor. Artık hayatı Lord Kaptan'ın ellerinde.
languages.original_text: The Angel of the Emperor has also been taken prisoner by the xenos. Powerless to avert his fate, he nonetheless yearns to continue his service. Now, his life rests in the Lord Captain's hands.

traits.locale_text: İmparator'un Meleği de zenolar tarafından esir alınmış. Kaderini önlemekten âciz olsa da yine de hizmetine devam etmeye can atıyor. Artık hayatı Lord Kaptan'ın ellerinde.
